title: Hattie's Flight to the Songo Feast
summary: Hattie the mouse embarks on a grand journey to reach a legendary feast at the Songo Restaurant. To get there, she must board an airplane at the airport and fly high above mountains and forests toward Cornell Street. Guided by a captain following a specific flight plan, Hattie and her friend Avery the baby mole eventually land, cross a drawbridge, and arrive at a cozy bedroom. There, they enjoy a massive buffet from the family bowl, sampling everything from mangoes to a mysterious 'cup of taste' before heading home for a well-deserved nap.

highlightQuote.text: You should drink some... a cup of taste... some... a cup of taste... you got to taste...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie, it's about seen noon days.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hello again everyone.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We had been making a nice setup.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A nice setup, says Hattie the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Of feast.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a feast! Could I come to the feast? I'd love going to a feast, I say.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's at Songo restaurant. That's really far from your house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Songo restaurant? Okay. Well, will you drive me there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You gotta take an airplane to get there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, an airplane? I've never been on an airplane before.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's towards my house in Cornell Street.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Can we fly there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And in... and in Hilltop Home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Hilltop Home, I see.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's also towards Hilltop Home. And then you gotta walk across the drawbridge. And then when you turn onto Cornell Street, the airplane will land at my house and you'll walk upstairs and into my bedroom and you can pick anything from the buffet. The apple, oven, and the apple and Hattie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then you might sit in that chair.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You may sit in that chair.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what a perfect spot for me. Wow, look at this feast! What should I try first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie, you need to go on an airplane to get there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. So Hattie goes to the airport and buys a ticket for the airplane and then she waits for the airplane to arrive. And then she stands in line to get on the airplane and then she gets on the airplane with everybody else. She sits in her seat and she buckles her seatbelt. And then the captain says, 'Okay, we're ready for takeoff.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, captain?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, we're going onto Cornell Street, towards Hilltop Home, crossing the drawbridge to walk, turning onto Cornell Street, going upstairs and taking that seat and then picking from the buffet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the captain of the airplane says, 'That sounds like a great flight plan. We're ready to take off.' And then the engines of the airplane turn on and it starts to move forward and they drive the airplane along the runway and then it lifts off up into the sky. And then they're flying up and up and up above all the cities and towns and the mountains and the forests and the lakes and the rivers. And everything gets small as they fly up and up high above the world and through the clouds.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think you're getting close to Cornell Street.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the captain says, 'Now we're getting ready for our descent.' That means they're going back down and so the airplane flies back down through the clouds and back towards the ground. And everything gets bigger and bigger as they get closer. And they see the airport where they're going to land and it's the airport right near Cornell Street. And the airplane comes down and lands and everyone can get off now.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And they go upstairs and into my room and Hattie, come here and take that seat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Hattie says, 'Wow, I had a great ride on the airplane.' Oh, and Avery, you came on the airplane too! Did you like being on the airplane? You know what they have on airplanes, bouncing a little bit. We could do a little bounce bounce bounce bounce bounce. Yeah? Bounce bounce bounce bounce bounce.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, Hattie sit in your seat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. And I'm bringing my friend, um, Avery. She's a baby mole. Oh, and can she come to the feast also? She's she's a little, um, fussy, but she would like to join the party too. You're invited too, Baby Mole. You hear that, Avery? You get to be in the story, yeah. And so then everyone sat down together at the feast. And what did they eat at their feast?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie, you can pick anything from the family bowl.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'll have some bread and some cheese and a banana, maybe some radish. Oh, and some mango! There's such delicious stuff at this feast. An apple, a watermelon... Oh, what should I have to drink?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You should drink some... a cup of taste... some... a cup of taste... you got to taste...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'll taste it. Mmm, yum!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think that's the end of the story because she went home and took a nap.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Then that's the end of our story.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: Now christened [Name], this diminutive mole is the newest addition to Izzy’s family and Hattie’s velvety baby sister. A tiny voyager often depicted in portraits wearing oversized clothes, she is a slumbering resident aboard the ship, finding bliss in milk-filled dreams within her cozy "house" upon the storyteller’s knee. To protect [Name]’s fragile rest, the crew maintains a state of hushed reverence, ensuring the vessel remains a quiet sanctuary for its smallest, most loyal passenger.

characters.name: Captain
characters.description: The pilot of the airplane who follows a specific flight plan to Cornell Street.

places.name: Songo Restaurant
places.description: A distant restaurant that is the initial destination for the feast.

places.name: Cornell Street
places.description: Bisected by a stark yellow line, this celestial artery cuts through a dense forest to chart a path toward the Mookers' planet. A cosmic thoroughfare where the infinite is stitched into the earthly, it anchors local commerce—typified by a towering tree of honey—alongside the residence of Uncle X, the house of the surreal bedroom feast, and Hattie’s home. It remains the vital threshold where the mundane pulse of the woods meets the stars, marking the point where Hattie begins her journey to find medical help.

places.name: Hilltop Home
places.description: A location passed during the journey to the feast.

places.name: The Drawbridge
places.description: A structure that must be crossed on foot after arriving near Cornell Street.

places.name: The Bedroom
places.description: The final destination where the buffet and family bowl are located.

places.name: The Airport
places.description: The starting point for Hattie's flight across the world.
